'''dhazate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:woodenly|woodenly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-z-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:woodenly|woodenly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhazate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dhazate|dhazate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhazatesher|dhazatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhazatesherĂ«m|dhazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhazatero|dhazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhazateshĂ«|dhazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhazateshĂ«m|dhazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhazatero|gokidhazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhazateshĂ«|gokidhazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhazateshĂ«m|gokidhazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhazankerom|godhazankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhazankeshĂ«|godhazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhazankeshĂ«m|godhazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhazankeya|godhazankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhazaterom|dhazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhazatemu|dhazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhazateya|dhazateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhazaterom|gokidhazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhazatemu|gokidhazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhazateya|gokidhazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhazazate|dhazazate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhazazatesher|dhazazatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhazazatesherĂ«m|dhazazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhazazatero|dhazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhazazateshĂ«|dhazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhazazateshĂ«m|dhazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhazazatero|gokidhazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhazazateshĂ«|gokidhazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhazazateshĂ«m|gokidhazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhazazankerom|godhazazankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhazazankeshĂ«|godhazazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhazazankeshĂ«m|godhazazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhazazankeya|godhazazankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhazazaterom|dhazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhazazatemu|dhazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhazazateya|dhazazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhazazaterom|gokidhazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhazazatemu|gokidhazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhazazateya|gokidhazazateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhĂŠzĂŠte|dhĂŠzĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhĂŠzĂŠtesher|dhĂŠzĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m|dhĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠzĂŠtero|dhĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|dhĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|dhĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠzĂŠtero|gokidhĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gokidhĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidhĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhĂŠzĂŠnkerom|godhĂŠzĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«|godhĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godhĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhĂŠzĂŠnkeya|godhĂŠzĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠzĂŠterom|dhĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠzĂŠtemu|dhĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhĂŠzĂŠteya|dhĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠzĂŠterom|gokidhĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠzĂŠtemu|gokidhĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠzĂŠteya|gokidhĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhafzafte|dhafzafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhafzaftesher|dhafzaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafzaftesherĂ«m|dhafzaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafzaftero|dhafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhafzafteshĂ«|dhafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafzafteshĂ«m|dhafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafzaftero|gokidhafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhafzafteshĂ«|gokidhafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafzafteshĂ«m|gokidhafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhafzafnkerom|godhafzafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhafzafnkeshĂ«|godhafzafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhafzafnkeshĂ«m|godhafzafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhafzafnkeya|godhafzafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafzafterom|dhafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafzaftemu|dhafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhafzafteya|dhafzafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafzafterom|gokidhafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafzaftemu|gokidhafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhafzafteya|gokidhafzafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
